title: The books of the Weather Bird Press oral history transcript, 1989 : Vance Gerry
creator: Gerry, Vance, interviewee
Ziegler, Rebecca, interviewer
University of California, Los Angeles. Oral History Program
description: Transcript of a 6.75-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program

Gerry discusses his schooling, early work experience, his career at Walt Disney Studio, and also his career as a printer; there is much discussion of the books he has printed, his ideas about book design and illustration and about other printers in Los Angeles
The Bancroft Library, University of California, Berkeley
Printer, artist, owner of the Weather Bird Press

The UCLA Oral History Program : catalog of the collection / compiled by Constance S. Bullock (Los Angeles : Oral History Program, University of California, Los Angeles, 1982) is available in the UCLA Dept. of Special Collections
Forms part of: Oral History collection, Dept. of Special Collections, University Library, University of California, Los Angeles
